## Summary
The string landscape (~10⁵⁰⁰ metastable vacua) combined with eternal inflation provides an anthropic framework for the cosmological constant.

## Evidence
Type IIB constructions (KKLT) demonstrate de Sitter vacua, but robustness is debated. The measure problem undermines unique predictions.

## Significance
Either the ultimate fine-tuning explanation or a retreat from predictive science.
